 -Justifications : nuwo|Type|Robot, Robot|SubClassOf|Agent, nuwo|hasCapability|ccirrb, ccirrb|isCapabilityOf|nuwo, nuwo|hasGripper|xkpihb, xkpihb|Type|TwoFingerClaw, TwoFingerClaw|SubClassOf|Gripper, xkpihb|holdsSomething|boolean#false, bpva|Type|RemoteControlledCar, RemoteControlledCar|SubClassOf|Object, bpva|hasDisposition|ik, chair_1_disp|isDispositionOf|bpva, bpva|hasPart|wc, wc|Type|Caster, Caster|SubClassOf|RollablePart, wc|isOnRollableSurface|boolean#true, bpva|isOnTable|rgbm, rgbm|isWithinMovingRangeOf|nuwo, xkpihb|Type|Gripper, Gripper|SubClassOf|EndEffector, nuwo|hasComponent|xkpihb, xkpihb|hasApplicableForce|integer#45, bpva|requiresForce|integer#45, equal(integer#45,integer#45) 
 -Rules : Agent(?a), hasCapability(?a, ?c), PushingCapability(?c), Object(?o), hasDisposition(?o, ?d), PushableDisposition(?d), isApproachableBy(?o,?a), EndEffector(?g), hasComponent(?a,?g), hasApplicableForce(?g,?w1), requiresForce(?o,?w2), equal(?w2,?w1) -> canPush(?a, ?o)
	PushingCapability|EquivalentTo|(isCapabilityOf some (hasGripper min 1 (Gripper and (holdsSomething value boolean#false))
	PushableDisposition|EquivalentTo|(isDispositionOf some (hasPart some (RollablePart and (isOnRollableSurface value boolean#true)))
	(isOnTable o isWithinMovingRangeOf)|SubPropertyOf|isApproachableBy
answers.answer: the robot can push the remote controlled car because it has a pushing capability, which is equivalent to having a two-finger claw as its gripper that doesn't hold anything, and the car is on a rollable surface, making it approachable by the robot.
